title: 🔳 Henon Map
name: Henon Map
what_it_is: A discrete chaotic system that generates 2D point patterns—like a scattered, elliptical vortex. Classic for strange attractor shapes.
how_to_use: energy field generated by Henon map logic—points swirl into chaotic ellipse
wings stitched from Henon chaos points—each feather a spatial trajectory
animation_behavior: Points orbit elliptically, cluster and scatter, seemingly random but bounded ---
